seo.landingTitle: AI Jewelry Identifier & Value Estimator | JLens

landing.storageDescription: A safer place for pieces between wears
landing.storage2: Keep in a cool, dry place
landing.maintenanceDescription: Small checks that help prevent bigger problems
landing.maintenance1: Check clasps, links, and settings regularly
landing.maintenance2: Clean gently after wearing to remove oils
landing.avoidDescription: Know what can cause unnecessary wear

landing.faq1Question: How do I identify jewelry from a photo?
landing.faq1Answer: Open JLens and take a clear photo or choose one from your library—start with the complete piece, then add a sharp close-up of any hallmark, clasp, engraving, or stone setting when you want more useful visible clues
landing.faq2Question: What jewelry and gemstones can JLens identify?
landing.faq2Answer: JLens can analyze photos of rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, pendants, watches, loose gemstones, crystals, and minerals, with likely matches based on what is visible in the submitted images
landing.faq3Question: Can JLens confirm whether gold or a diamond is real?
landing.faq3Answer: No photo-based AI can certify metal purity or gemstone authenticity—JLens can explain visible marks and possible materials, but professional testing is needed when authenticity matters
landing.faq4Question: Is an estimated value a professional appraisal?
landing.faq4Answer: No—JLens provides an informational estimated range based on visible characteristics and available context, while condition, provenance, laboratory testing, and market demand can materially change value, so use a qualified appraiser for insurance, sale, estate, or legal decisions
landing.faq5Question: Can I save scans and track a jewelry collection?
landing.faq5Answer: Yes—you can save identified pieces, revisit their results, and use the collection view to organize your jewelry and review its combined estimated value
landing.faq6Question: Is JLens available on iPhone and Android?
landing.faq6Answer: Yes—JLens is available through the Apple App Store for iPhone and iPad and through Google Play for supported Android devices

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help with JLens? Contact support for product questions, technical issues, privacy requests, and account assistance.
support.emailSupportBody: For product help, privacy questions, and data requests, email:
support.responseTime: We typically respond within 24 to 48 business hours.
support.reportBody: Tell us what you expected to happen and what happened instead. Do not include passwords, full payment-card numbers, or other sensitive account credentials.
support.report1: Your device model and operating system version.
support.report2: The JLens version shown in the app settings.
support.report3: A clear description of the issue and the steps that reproduce it.
support.report5: Any error message shown by the app.
support.report6: Screenshots or a screen recording with sensitive information removed.
support.legalBody: Learn how JLens handles information in our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and review the rules for using the app in our <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms>.
support.deletionBody: To request deletion of any account or personal data associated with JLens, email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email>. We may ask you to verify ownership before completing the request. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details about deletion and limited retention.
support.featureBody: Have an idea for JLens? Email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email> and explain the problem you would like the feature to solve.
